notes: Formalises the kernel-torsor / Galois-correspondence proof of Silverman III.4.10c (#ker φ = deg φ for separable φ), parametrised on three genuine-isogeny hypotheses (hcov, h_normal, hdesc) that are discharged downstream for φ = [ℓ]. The file is axiom-clean with no sorry and no maxHeartbeats overrides. The master result `card_kernel_eq_degree_of_separable_concrete` and its helper `genericPointAct_mem_ker_g` are not referenced within this file, so they are dead-code candidates here but are clearly intended as exported API.
